channel.title: Comments on: Easy Mentions v0.2 Plugin for bbPress!

item.title: By: Kiwi
item.dc:creator: Kiwi
item.description: I like your plugin! It is exactly what I am looking for. One little thing: It would be cool, if mentioned users could be notified by email. Is that possible?
item.content:encoded: I like your plugin! It is exactly what I am looking for. One little thing: It would be cool, if mentioned users could be notified by email. Is that possible?

item.title: By: Ashfame
item.dc:creator: Ashfame
item.description: This is a good plugin you have made Gautam. Nice going with the project. I will soon contact you regarding bbPress.
item.content:encoded: This is a good plugin you have made Gautam. Nice going with the project. I will soon contact you regarding bbPress.
